# Pull request

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do and why? -->

## Linked issue

<!-- e.g. Closes #123 -->
Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] fix (bug fix)
- [ ] feature (new capability)
- [ ] docs
- [ ] refactor
- [ ] test
- [ ] ci

## How tested

<!-- Paste the relevant `pytest -q` result (and any kicad-cli / fixture notes). -->

```
pytest -q
```

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`pytest -q`).
- [ ] Zero runtime dependencies preserved (stdlib-only at runtime; new deps, if any, are `[dev]`-only).
- [ ] No proprietary / NDA fixtures committed — synthetic samples only.
- [ ] Docs / README updated if behavior or interface changed.
- [ ] License-clean — no copied third-party source.
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits (e.g. `fix:`, `feat:`, `docs:`).
